label: CLV Performance
description: Closing line value tracking with hit rate, mean CLV, and P&L breakdown by market and bookmaker.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary present in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=["sports-trading"]. 0.3 availableOn=["sports"]. 0.4 No any/ts-ignore. 0.5 No direct mock imports in widget file — MOCK_CLV_RECORDS was a knownIssue but widget sources via useSportsData().clvRecords; context owns the mock import. 0.6 No async loading path (pure mock architecture). 0.7 Empty state: records.length===0 guard renders 'No CLV data available'. 0.8 No error path in context (mock-only). 0.9 No dead code.

l1.notes: 1.1 Data via useSportsData().clvRecords — no inline fetch. 1.2 Context calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3 CLV records are bet-derived and gated by hasSportsDesk org filter. 1.4 N/A — no client-level scope for sports CLV. 1.5 N/A — strategy filter not applicable. 1.6 Empty organizationIds shows all CLV data. 1.7 No reference data in widget file.

findings: MOCK_CLV_RECORDS knownIssue resolved: widget accesses records via useSportsData() context hook — context owns the mock import boundary, widget file is clean.
